text_original: Best AI chat bot I have found for me. Great memory, well structured characters.
text_zh: 这是我发现的最适合我的 AI 聊天机器人。记忆力出色，角色构建得很好。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! We are thrilled to hear that you are enjoying the character depth and memory features. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going. We will keep working hard to create even more magical memories for you! If you ever have suggestions, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！听到您喜欢角色深度和记忆功能，我们感到非常激动。您的支持是激励我们不断前行的动力。我们将继续努力，为您创造更多奇妙的回忆！如果您有任何建议，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。
